entries.text: Upgrade tree for weapons and outfits - browse every upgrade tier and see costs and stat changes at a glance.

Starting Loadouts planner - browse and plan your new game loadout for all 13 factions. Select items, track your point budget with a live progress bar, and see which ammo you'll receive. Supports all three difficulty levels and persists selections per faction.
Ballistic help and instructions panel - learn how damage, armor penetration, and hit zones work with an in-app guide accessible from the Ballistics tab.
Weapon attachments - Scopes, Silencers, Underbarrel, and Tactical Kits with compatible weapons and attachment tiles on weapon modals.

Ballistics calculator - compare up to 5 weapon + ammo loadouts against any stalker or mutant target. See damage, AP, penetration, shots to kill, and a radar chart breakdown. Click Ballistics in the tab bar to try it.
Interactive map - explore the Zone with a zoomable, multi-resolution map. Click Maps in the tab bar to try it out.
Artifact crafting trees - see every recipe chain at a glance.
Grim Raid Addon 2.4 mod pack with full item data, icons, and drop locations.
Stash drop chances for Anomaly 1.5.3 items.
Responsive layout improvements - header, filter bar, and version compare toolbar now collapse gracefully on tablet and mobile.
Version compare filter selections now persist in the URL, so filtered views can be shared or bookmarked.
Save file import now correctly resolves weapons with GAMMA-style addon suffixes and assigns loadout slots based on equipped state.
Save file import in the build planner - drag and drop your .scop and .scoc save files to auto-populate your loadout, inventory, and stash.
Ammo tooltips on weapon caliber badges - hover any ammo type on a gun to see an image, armor penetration, damage, accuracy, and cost per round.
Clicking an ammo badge on a weapon now navigates directly to that ammo item.
Version Compare page - accessible from the sidebar, with category and property filters to drill into specific balance changes between pack versions.
Item icons now appear in the item detail modal and build planner hover previews.
Flag filters like Powered Exo and Craftable now support both Yes and No options, so you can exclude items that match.
Alt ammo toggle on the ammo type filter - include weapons that can be converted to a particular caliber alongside those that natively fire it.
Belt slots now automatically use the fully upgraded slot count for each outfit - no more manual +/- adjustments needed.
Build sharing now works for all ammo types, including OG-7B and VOG-25 variants.
Adding favourites to build planner inventory now correctly updates stats.
French translations for item names, descriptions, and app UI.
Toolkit Rates - see the drop chances for Basic, Advanced, Expert, Drug-making, and Gunsmithing tools across every map at a glance.
Resist caps in the build planner now calculate correctly - cap bonuses from all equipped artefacts stack onto the 65% base instead of being ignored.
GAMMA 0.9.5 mod pack (preview).
Cross-pack stat comparison in the item modal - see what changed between pack versions.
Radar chart view in the Compare modal - visually compare pinned items across all stats.
Weapon Chart in the build planner - overlay your equipped weapons on a radar chart to compare stats at a glance.
Bonus belt slots for tracking outfit upgrades.
Shareable build codes - copy a short code or link to share your full loadout and inventory.
Keyboard shortcuts for common actions like search, view toggling, and item navigation.
Sidebar can now be collapsed on desktop for more screen space.
Anomaly 1.5.3 mod pack with 798 items across 16 categories.
Weapon slots in the build planner: primary, secondary, sidearm (pistol/knife), and grenade with ammo selection and combined weapon stats.
Build planner now shows your total carry capacity, combining base carry weight with equipment bonuses.
Release notes page with a notification badge when new updates are available.
Ammo tiles now show cost per pack and cost per round.
Compare equipped items against inventory items in the build planner to see which is better.
Build planner for planning and comparing loadouts with combined stats, weight, and protection breakdowns.
Initial release of Stalker Gamma Database.
